title: Bhed Ek Rahasya
subTitle: Sattu, a professional killer, is given the task to kidnap a famous industrialist. However, chaos ensues when the man's daughter gets involved with a criminal.

title: Time Pass
subTitle: A boy wants to get intimate with a girl who is his family friend. So, his friends try to help him, but the plan goes haywire when he takes her out in the midst of communal tension.

title: Gali Gali Chor Hai
subTitle: Bharat, a common man, decides to fight corruption and secure the rights of common people when some government officials take advantage of him.

title: Ilaka
subTitle: Ilaka

title: EMI: Liya Hai to Chukana Padega
subTitle: Sattar Bhai runs a collection agency called Good Luck Recovery in Mumbai's Bhendi Bazar area. Famous for his notoriety, he uses unconventional methods to make four defaulters repay their debts.

title: Suhaag
subTitle: College friends Ajay and Raj always play pranks on each other and then get into trouble. One day, Ajay needs his birth certificate for his passport, but he is shocked to find out his real name.

title: Fight Club
subTitle: Unhappy with his capitalistic lifestyle, a white-collared insomniac forms an underground fight club with Tyler, a careless soap salesman. Soon, their venture spirals down into something sinister.

title: Shor in the City
subTitle: In the city of Mumbai, an NRI businessman, a minor criminal and an aspiring cricketer grapple with life-changing choices during the chaotic period of the festival of Ganesh Chaturthi.

title: Baghban
subTitle: Raj and Pooja live an upsetting life when their sons refuse to reciprocate their affections and take care of them.

title: Patth
subTitle: Avi, a young man, murders Bhullar, a local gangster, along with his friends after his sister, Nandini, is killed. Later, they surrender themselves to Bhullar's boss and eventually join his gang.

subTitle: Lallan, a security guard, loves Saroja, who is supposed to get married to an older man for money. However, while convincing her to change her mind, he finds out another shocking fact about her.

title: Khuda Kasam
subTitle: CBI Officer Neetu Singh is framed for the assassination of a chief minister. She then attempts to solve this murder mystery with the help of a man, who is imprisoned for a crime he never committed.

title: Gumnaam: The Mystery
subTitle: A stuntman falls in love with an aspiring actress. However, he must set out to find and rescue her after she mysteriously disappears.

subTitle: Mangal Pandey and William Gordon become friends during a war in Afghanistan. But when the East India Company introduces a rifle that uses objectionable cartridges, Mangal Pandey rises in revolt.

subTitle: Simran helps her best friend, Rohan, win over the girl he likes, Preeti. However, trouble ensues when Simran gets pregnant and Rohan is forced to marry her.

subTitle: After being kidnapped into a cartoon world, Aditya Kumar, a famous actor, turns into a real hero as he fights against the Toonasaurs.

subTitle: Jatin and Karishma, who meet each other on a plane to India, are set to marry the partners chosen by their respective parents. However, they find themselves attracted to each other.

subTitle: Kia, an ambitious woman, marries Kabir, a man who prefers the role of a house husband. They enjoy their unconventional relationship until challenges such as ego clashes and jealousy set in.

subTitle: A young couple visit a farmhouse to relax and unwind. However, their plans for rejuvenation are thrown into disarray when horrific events unfold.
